Our Services

Professional tree removal solutions for every need

Tree Removal

Safe and efficient tree removal for any size or species.

Learn More →

Stump Grinding

Complete stump removal to reclaim your yard's beauty and functionality.

Learn More →

Tree Trimming

Enhance the health and appearance of your trees with professional trimming.

Learn More →

Emergency Tree Service

24/7 emergency tree removal and storm damage cleanup.

Learn More →

Land Clearing

Efficient land clearing services for construction and development projects.

Learn More →

Tree Risk Assessment

Professional assessment of tree health and potential hazards.

Learn More →
D & A Tree Service Inc

Trusted tree removal professionals serving Bakersfield, CA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
